reviews.comment:
Alli llene NAFTA y otras cosas espero que YPF este bien y que siga siendo muy exitoso ademas sus YPF de toda argentina tienen para comprar repuestos para el auto, camioneta, camión, moto, ect ,comprar comida y cosas tiene mesas con sillas adentro tiene baños de hombres, mujeres y diferentes formas de pagar las cosas .

(Translated by Google)
I filled up with gasoline and other things there. I hope YPF is doing well and continues to be very successful. Also, YPF stations throughout Argentina have places to buy spare parts for cars, vans, trucks, motorcycles, etc., buy food and other things. They have tables with chairs inside, men's and women's restrooms, and different ways to pay.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkdEs2UENBEAE
